title: Kosmolot's Colored Subtitles
description: Color the important stuff. Gray out the nonsense. Viva la readability!
body:
# Kosmolot's Colored Subtitles

Too many subtitles? This pack gives them meaningful colors so that the important ones stand out.

* Red: dangerous things you should pay attention to.
* Dark red: ambient sounds of dangerous things.
* Yellow: unusual, potentially dangerous events like raid horns or lightning strikes.
* Gold: expected timed events like fishing splashes, brewing stand bubbling, zombie villager converting.
* Green: unusual, safe events like the wandering traders' hmm's.
* Dark green: ambient sounds of safe things, like animals.
* Blue: water-related ambient sounds.
* Dark gray: things that you can ignore, like footsteps or bats.

## Bugs? Suggestions?

If you feel something is wrong with the pack and want to improve it, change some colors, etc., feel free to [submit an issue](https://github.com/kosma/colored-subtitles/issues) or [do a pull request](https://github.com/kosma/colored-subtitles).
